name: KGL Resources Ltd.
summary: KGL Resources Ltd. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mineral resource properties in the Democratic Republic of Congo. It holds a 20% interest of mining rights in four iron ore concessions located in the Bamyan province of Afghanistan. The company was formerly known as Kilo Goldmines Ltd. and changed its name to KGL Resources Ltd. in March 2021. KGL Resources Ltd. is based in Toronto, Canada.
